item.title: some good news from mexico
item.description: In a statement, Mexico?s Supreme Court said the ?criminalization of abortion constitutes an act of gender-based violence and discrimination, as it perpetuates the stereotype that women and people with the capacity to get pregnant can only freely exercise their sexuality to procreate and reinforces the gender role that imposes motherhood as a compulsory destiny.? full article: https://www.nytimes.com/2023/09/06/world/americas/mexico-abortion-decriminalize-supreme-court.html reading this made me happy this morning, so i thought i'd share with my favourite online strangers on imgur (originally posted by @rbbli on 2023-09-07 07:51:30)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Fresh daily dump for you coffee #382
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
8
9
10
11
12
13
14
15. Me trying to make it as an indie game dev! P.S. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Georgia shooting : Father arrested for gifting a AR-15 AFTER a FBI warning visit
item.description: Colin Gray, 54, faces the following charges: - 4 counts of Involuntary Manslaughter - 2 counts of Second Degree Murder - 8 counts of Cruelty to Children https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/live-blog/georgia-school-shooting-apalachee-live-updates-rcna169694 NB: Christmas isn't mentioned,

item.title: Images of Note: Why are you clay?
item.description:
Highway to the Blanky Zone!
Me if I ever learn to drive
That's...a lot of space for Grindr and Barq.
Who says I'm Clay?
HELL YEAH!
All the memes
AAAAAA
If they were playing Rugby while riding the sheep this would be the most Welsh Image ever made.
Moet ik soms op mijn broer passen?
This is me @everyone-ing people using Arch.
Jaegermeister It's made of various german herbs Jaegermeister It'll make you forget verbs Jaegermeister although doctors would call you "fool". Jaegermeister You can mix it with Red Bull.
Lepanto institute has never heard of the Reformation.
S O U P !
PISS PILLS!
Have I ever had Coffee with a Bottom? My sibling in sin I *am* the Bottom.
The fact Kirk has only one (1) canonical son is a miracle.
SOUND ON
:D
Sounds like something that happened in 40K
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

Beastie Boys
Pat Benatar

Altered Images
Clare Grogan from Altered Images. Some may recognise her from Gregory's Girl and as Kochanski in Red Dwarf

item.title: Fell back, but got up
item.description: 3 months ago I fell off the wagon, almost had a heartattack. But for the past 3 months, I have walked and trained, eat healthier and not a single drop of the bad juice. I feel the urge sometimes but I am happier

item.title: Working hard and getting stronger
item.description: I really enjoy going to therapy each week. I have gotten so much stronger. I enjoy working towards my goals. Some days are frustrating. But I just keep working hard. I hope everyone is having a wonderful day.
item.dc:creator: kaosnole95

item.title: It's true. And it's glorious. And it's free. You just login to your baking site, type in a person's email address, the amount, and send.
item.description: You can even setup automatic deposit, so someone can send you money, and 30 minutes later it'll be in your account without having to do anything.
item.dc:creator: majortool

item.title: Grandson Surprises Former Model Grandma With Makeover & Photoshoot ... Grandpa's Gonna Need To Step Up His Game ..
item.description:
Oliver Muhl, 20, surprises his grandmother, 77, who was once a prominent model gracing the pages of renowned fashion magazines such as Vogue, Marie Claire, Jour de France, and Elle. In an effort to recreate the glamour of her past, Oliver organized a full glam squad—including makeup artists, hairstylists, and a wardrobe team—before taking her on a photoshoot in Paris, France.
https://www.newsweek.com/man-surprises-former-model-grandma-photoshoot-grandpa-awe-1946570 https://www.tiktok.com/@olliemuhl/video/7405715080257621290
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
